author: spencer_tb
content:
🧪  `glamsterdam-devnet@v7.2.0`: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v7.2.0

We are using this EELS branch for reference: `devnets/glamsterdam/7`. [Release notes](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v7.2.0) & [new test release tracker](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/3147).

A small spec change (bug fix) with minor test updates, no new EIPs. Thanks <@508125616940515329> & <@792404665068158998>!

**New in v7.2.0:**
- EIP-8037: calldata floor now applies to block-level regular gas, so state gas cannot discount the floor, [EIPs#11908](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11908).
